creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #0)
Can you unbreak the ports tree before requesting yet another exp-run?


Error: Duplicated origin for npm-node20-10.8.1: www/npm-node20 AND
www/npm-node21. Rerun with -v to see which ports are depending on
these.
Error: Duplicated origin for yarn-node20-1.22.19: www/yarn-node21 AND
www/yarn-node20. Rerun with -v to see which ports are depending on
these.


I perform 0 exp-run when the ports tree is broken.
